channel.title: jb-marketplace-plugins-jetbrains
channel.description: The latest JetBrains plugins on the JetBrains marketplace
channel.dc:creator: Jonathan Lermitage

item.title: Uyava Desktop Launcher - Mon Mar 09 03:30:16 UTC 2026
item.description:
One-click launcher that finds a running Flutter/Dart VM Service and opens Uyava Desktop Pro with the project context.
vendor: Uyava downloads: 2 pricingModel: FREE xmlId: io.uyava.desktop.launcher

item.title: Compose HotSwan - Sun Mar 15 00:25:20 UTC 2026
item.description:
Compose HotSwan: Fast, reliable hot reload for Jetpack Compose. Edit your Jetpack Compose or resource files, save, and see changes on the device instantly: no app...
vendor: skydoves downloads: 34 pricingModel: FREEMIUM xmlId: com.skydoves.compose.hotswan
